comments: Approved. The contract scope is appropriately bounded to three execution areas: (1) updating package.json to version 0.8.5, (2) verifying the uninstall flow through a bash-based test artifact (test_uninstall.sh) for end-to-end validation of 'team-agents-cowork uninstall', and (3) updating README.md, README_zh-CN.md, documentation/EN/core-concepts/dual-track-gating.md, and documentation/ZH/core-concepts/dual-track-gating.md through dispatch to an AI Coding Agent. The allowed_files list matches that bounded scope and includes only the expected documentation targets, package manifest, uninstall test script, and task-local artifacts. The out_of_scope clause explicitly forbids Hermes (L2 Orchestrator) from hand-writing documentation patches natively, which preserves Strict Separation of Duties for documentation execution. Stop conditions also reinforce this boundary by requiring execution to halt if Hermes attempts native documentation patching. No contract language was found that expands scope into src/mcp-server business logic or broader workflow state changes beyond the stated patch.
